Tiny Corp 的 Exabox

Tiny Corp's Exabox

twitter.com 作者 macleginn 分数 54 评论 17 2026/04/06 19:39
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 出了点问题，但别担心——让我们再试一次。某些与隐私相关的扩展程序可能会导致 x.com 出现问题。请禁用它们并重试。

Original Summary

  1. Something went wrong, but don’t fret — let’s give it another shot. Some privacy related extensions may cause issues on x.com. Please disable them and try again.

评论（默认中文）

sva_ 2026/04/06 20:50
这张图片显示它位于树林中的某个地方，所以大概有点脱离电网，这看起来很酷，直到你意识到一个业余小偷用撬棍可能会打开它。

编辑：离网评论有点愚蠢，但我的意思是，大概这个东西需要放置在全天候安全的地方

That picture of it being somewhere in the woods, so presumably somewhat off-grid seems cool until you realize an amateur thief with a crowbar could probably crack that open.

Edit: the off-grid comment is a bit silly but I mean presumably this thing would need to be placed somewhere with around the clock security

voidUpdate 2026/04/06 21:08

It's an AI generated image so I wouldn't trust anything in it apart from the gemini icon

ttul 2026/04/06 22:38
已确认：右侧背景中有某种高压变压器，完全坐在幼儿触手可及的地面上。这绝对不是一个合规的高压装置！
Confirmed: there is some kind of high voltage transformer in the background at right, sitting on the ground entirely in reach of toddlers. That is most definitely not a compliant high voltage installation!

mindslight 2026/04/07 00:20
但你所需要的只是一块“混凝土板”！您甚至可以“干倒”它，因为无论如何您都需要润湿照片。
But all you need is a "concrete slab" ! You could even "dry pour" it, since you're going to need a wetdown for the photos anyway.

在 HN 中查看
cherryteastain 2026/04/07 01:37
奇怪的是他们将 GPU 列为“RDNA5 AT0 XL”。 RDNA5 尚未发布，但该命名似乎与此泄漏中的命名一致 [1]。它被明确标记为“桌面/游戏”型号，具有 154 个 CU 和 36GB VRAM。

[1] https://www.club386.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/rdna-5-ml...

Curious that they listed the GPU as "RDNA5 AT0 XL". RDNA5 is not out yet, but that naming seems to align with the naming in this leak [1]. It's explicitly labelled as a "desktop/gaming" model with 154 CUs and 36GB of VRAM.

[1] https://www.club386.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/rdna-5-ml...

在 HN 中查看
hmokiguess 2026/04/06 21:57
我很惊讶人们可以在 Shopify 上设置这种操作，更惊讶的是有消费者乐意将其作为包含所有费用的支付前门。
I'm amazed one can just setup this kind of operation on Shopify, even more amazed that there can be consumers happy to go through with this as the payment front door with all the fees included.
在 HN 中查看
ttul 2026/04/06 22:41
当我在 2011 年开始为我那家倒闭的比特币硬件公司接受预订时，人们愿意电汇 10 万美元，而几乎没有验证我们的硬件是否存在（事实并非如此），更不用说它是否有效（它从来没有发生过）。我们从未接受过任何订单，部分原因是在我拥有可以承担风险的股权投资者而不是倒霉的消费者之前，我不愿意只 YOLO 它。

转念一想，我应该拿走他们的钱。

When I started taking pre-orders for my failed Bitcoin hardware company in 2011, people were willing to wire $100K with almost no verification that our hardware existed (it did not), never mind whether it worked (it never did). We never accepted a single order, partly because I wasn’t willing to just YOLO it before I had equity investors who could take the risk instead of hapless consumers.

On reflection, I should have taken their money.

在 HN 中查看
parsadotsh 2026/04/06 22:05
> 银行存款

> 完成订单后，您将收到一封包含电汇详细信息的订单确认电子邮件。注意：未付款订单将在 5 天后取消。收到付款后，您将收到另一封电子邮件，订单发货后，您将收到一封电子邮件。送货到住宅地址可能需要致电安排。

> Bank Deposit

> After you complete your order, you will receive an order confirmation email with wire details. NOTE: UNPAID ORDERS WILL BE CANCELED AFTER 5 DAYS. You will receive another email when your payment has been received and an email when your order ships. Deliveries to residential addresses may require a phone call for scheduling.

Ah, that explains it, I forgot Shopify allows for manual payments without fees. Appreciate the reply!

twentyfiveoh1 2026/04/06 22:27
我对这些人不太熟悉。 “预购”就像 kickstarter 一样？那些精益探索性的事情之一？

他们没有可以演示的产品，但他们希望全额付款？

他们是否会对此进行白标，或者是否计划在有兴趣的情况下对其进行设计并“最终”交付？

I am not too familiar with these people. "preorder" is like a kickstarter ? One of those LEAN exploratory things?

They have no product that they can demo but they expect payment in full?

Are they white-labeling this or do they plan to design it if there is interest and ship it "eventually" ?

This is geohot's newest thing. While he's definitely a cowboy, he has shipped hardware successfully at Comma.
